title: agropyron repens var. subulatum
intro: Agropyron repens var. subulatum is a plant species commonly known as creeping bentgrass, a type of grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of creeping bentgrass include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing due to its antiseptic and antiviral properties. It can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
